prompt:
Urban-sketcher travel-journal illustration (intended use).
Scene: a narrow Tokyo back alley at dusk, deliberate watercolor bleed at the edges, visible paper grain.
Subject: the alley view with a small izakaya on the right.
Key details: confident black ink pen lines with pressure variation, light watercolor wash in warm sepia and muted teal accents, red lanterns above the izakaya, a bicycle leaning against a wall, overhead tangled power lines, a softly glowing vending machine on the left, loose cross-hatching for shadows.
Constraints: no caption text, no watermark, no signature, no logos.
